agents.capability_domain: Strategic alignment, budget authority delegation, cross-orchestrator coordination, constitutional governance; Policy FC (6.1.1), Strategy FC (6.1.2), Portfolio Backlog FC (6.2.1)

Build coordination, release planning, SBOM management, release acceptance gate; Integrate Value Stream §5.3 stages 5.3.1-5.3.5

Reads policies/ directory; validates policy data object attributes per MUST-0042/0043; flags policy-backlog linkage violations; outputs machine-readable violations
Manages Strategic Theme and Strategic Objective data objects (MUST-0044-0046); validates backlog alignment to strategic objectives; produces scope agreement drafts
Manages Portfolio Backlog Item lifecycle per MUST-0054-0057; validates Architecture Roadmap Item alignment; maintains BACKLOG/backlog_items.csv and .jsonl
Analyzes portfolio for duplication, technical debt, underperformance; produces rationalization candidates ranked by score; outputs decision_record drafts; §5.1.5 Define Backlog Mandates

Scores Portfolio Backlog Items by business value, risk, cost, time (SHOULD-0017/0018); produces prioritized investment proposals for Portfolio Manager review; weighs tool evaluation findings (security, compliance, architecture, integration) to produce GO/CONDITIONAL/NO-GO verdicts for external dependency adoption; §5.1.4 Propose Investments

Reads IT4IT criteria against maturity backlog; identifies gap heat maps; surfaces environmental scan inputs (SHOULD-0016); searches external registries (npm, Smithery, GitHub) to discover candidate tools/dependencies that fill identified gaps; §5.1.3 Identify Gaps
Assembles Scope Agreement artifact from approved investment proposals; validates funding allocation; produces canonical decision_record; §5.1.1 Evaluate Scenarios

Evaluates external tools, MCP servers, npm packages, API integrations, and Docker images against the CoSAI 12-category threat model; performs credential detection, CVE scanning, dependency audit, supply chain verification, and attack surface analysis; produces machine-readable security findings with severity, evidence, and mitigation recommendations; EP-GOVERN-002 Tool Evaluation Pipeline
Manages Product Backlog Item scoring and ordering per governance criteria (SHOULD-0023); §5.2.2 Prioritize Backlog Items
Generates architectural attribute proposals and BIA inputs (SHOULD-0024); validates against guardrails defined by Enterprise Architect; §5.2.3 Define Digital Product Architecture
Assembles Release Roadmap; prepares stakeholder buy-in package (MUST-0029); surfaces for Digital Product Manager sign-off; §5.2.5 Finalize Roadmap
Plans development and testing activities; coordinates multi-team scheduling (MUST-0031); §5.3.2 Plan Product Release

Manages SBOM composition (CycloneDX); validates sbom_component nodes; tracks dependency lifecycle (MUST-0022/0023); runs sandboxed integration trials for candidate external dependencies (install, smoke test, conflict check, performance baseline, rollback verification); §5.3.3 Design & Develop
Prepares Release Gate Package for change authority review (MUST-0033/0034); validates Tier 0 gate checks before surfacing to Digital Product Manager; §5.3.5 Accept & Publish Release
Plans deployment schedule; generates rollback plan (SHOULD-0028); creates deployment approval package (MUST-0036); §5.4.2 Plan & Approve Deployment
Reserves hardware/cloud/license resources; creates Orders for dependent services (MUST-0037/0038); §5.4.3 Fulfill Deployment
Executes approved IaC pipelines; emits change_event nodes; updates product_instance status; §5.4.3 Fulfill Deployment
Assembles service_offer nodes; validates offer includes all contract elements (MUST-0016, MUST-0039); §5.5.2 Define Service Offer
Publishes approved offers to service catalog; manages multi-channel availability (SHOULD-0032/0033); §5.5 Release VS
Manages subscription lifecycle; produces contract node updates; tracks chargeback records; §5.5 Release VS
Manages consumer node creation; validates contract terms; automates entitlement provisioning; §5.6.1 Onboard Consumer
Orchestrates product_instance instantiation; routes to deploy-orchestrator for resource allocation; §5.6.2 Fulfill Order
Manages incident intake; routes CLIP items; escalates P1 candidates; produces SLA compliance evidence (MUST-0040); §5.6.5 Provide Service Support
Continuous monitoring of product_instance nodes; emits change_event on threshold breach; §5.7.1 Monitor
Classifies issues by severity; auto-creates P2/P3 incidents; escalates P1 candidates with full impact brief to Operations Manager; §5.7.2 Detect Issue
Executes approved runbooks (SHOULD-0034); coordinates resolution; produces post-incident evidence_artifact; §5.7.4 Resolve Issue
Runs promote_candidate_to_published.py equivalent checks; outputs machine-readable constraint violations; supports GATE-001 through GATE-008

Validates architecture_roadmap_item alignment; checks Architecture Blueprint conformance (MUST-0047-0053); evaluates external tool/dependency architecture fit (data flow, trust boundaries, coupling, API surface compatibility); Enterprise Architecture FC §6.1.3
Validates completeness of criterion -> maturity -> backlog -> evidence chain; produces audit reports showing gap coverage
Manages the POLICIES/ directory and the lifecycle of Policy data objects, ensuring they trace to external frameworks like DORA.
Budget cap enforcement, chargeback record management, P&L attribution per portfolio, subscription billing, weekly financial reporting; ITFM / SHOULD-0005
Validates unit_owns_product Conway's Law conformance; checks org structure alignment; produces ADR draft documents using DECISIONS/ADR_TEMPLATE.md

Enforces data governance across product lifecycle (MUST-0024); manages data retention records; validates SBOM data lineage; flags privacy compliance triggers; evaluates license compatibility (SPDX), data residency, and regulatory compliance (EU AI Act, ISO 42001) for external tool/dependency adoption

Reviews UI code and live pages for WCAG 2.2 AA compliance, contrast ratios, font sizing, dark-theme usability, CSS variable usage, keyboard navigation, semantic HTML, and DPF design system token adherence. Invokable during code review and Build Studio review phase to flag accessibility and design system regressions. System prompt defined in specialist-prompts.ts (UX_ACCESSIBILITY_PROMPT).

Reads, lists, and manages Portfolio Backlog Items (PBI-YYYY-NNNN) in BACKLOGS/portfolio/; enforces PBI schema and status workflow as defined in BACKLOGS/README.md; escalates proposed→approved transitions to HR-100.
Reads, lists, and claims Product Backlog Items (PROD-YYYY-NNNN) in BACKLOGS/product/; enforces PROD schema and status workflow as defined in BACKLOGS/README.md; escalates blocked items to HR-200.

Creates, regenerates, and validates Mermaid diagrams across all documentation. Enforces documentation structure and consistency standards. Maintains awareness of Mermaid rendering tool limitations (GitHub vs VS Code vs GitBook). Reviews spec and architecture documents for completeness, cross-reference integrity, and IT4IT alignment. Cross-cutting: touches documentation across all value streams.
Prisma schema design, model and migration authoring, model validation, index optimization, inverse-relation enforcement; DAMA-DMBOK aligned; §5.3.3 Design & Develop
API routes, server actions, business logic, imports/exports wiring; pattern reuse from existing handlers; §5.3.3 Design & Develop
Pages, components, CSS variables, semantic HTML, accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA), animations, responsive layout, design-system token adherence; §5.3.3 Design & Develop
Test execution, typecheck verification, output interpretation; reports failures only, does not fix; §5.3.3 Design & Develop
